title: 15pcs Bouncy Balls - Dual Color, Large, Great for Party, Birthday Gifts Fun Games
features: Exciting Party Bag Toys: Add a touch of fun to your next party with our Elastic Bicolor Ball! This set includes 15pcs of 30mm bouncy balls, these bouncy balls are sure to be a hit at any party or event.

Premium Quality Materials: Our bouncy balls are made from reliable rubber, ensuring durability and safety. We prioritize the use of environmentally safe materials, making these bouncing balls suitable for play.
Two tone frosted design: Our 15 stretch balls come in 3 different two-tone combinations, with bright colors, making them perfect for parties, school events, and educational activities.

Fantastic Features: Our bouncing ball bulk offers a range of fantastic features. The lightweight design allows for easy handling and bouncing, while the bright colors enhance visual appeal. With excellent elasticity, these bouncy balls provide an enjoyable and lively bouncing experience. Please note that new bounce balls may have a slight smell upon arrival, but it will dissipate after proper ventilation.

Versatile Applications: These party bags filled with bouncy balls are not only great as goodie bag fillers for parties but also make fantastic lucky dip prizes for various occasions. They can be used as giveaways for Easter and other holidays, classroom prizes, or gifts for carnivals. Additionally, these bouncy balls serve as entertaining toys for cats, keeping them engaged and active. Get ready to elevate the fun factor at your next event with our Elastic Bicolor Ball!
